{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-ID-GOES-HERE",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

    "RX.1": 4,

    "RX.5": 2

  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent provides a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is polished and reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (language coverage inconsistency).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent provides a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is polished and reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (language coverage inconsistency).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
